titleStmt.title: SII 38.354: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 354. (A.R. No. 354 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Immaḍirāyadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1429. Raktākshi, Mīṉa, ba. 10. Friday, irregular. But tallies with 1505 A.D. February 28. Both the cyclic year, Raktākshi and Śaka year 1429 are wrong. The cyclic year should be Krōdhana and Śaka year 1427.

summary.p: It records that the pontiff of Bhīkshā-maḍam, Viśvēśvara Śivāchārya Aiyyaṉ, who was also responsible for the treasury of the Tirumalar-uḍaiyār temple at Dēvikkāpuram, a dēvasthānam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam and the tāṉattār of the temple conferred the right of cultivation, uḻavukāṇiyāṭchi in Maṇaṟpākkam alias Sōmāśipuram at Kaṉṉaḍiya Māraṇai, a obaḷi (a division) in Śīrmaipuram on a certain Nayiṉān piḷḷai, son of Kaḷappāḷar Sūryadēvaṉār, a shepherd of Dēvikkāpuram. It is also stated that Āḷappirandāṉ Samarapuṅgava-dīkshitar of Āgni-gōtrā, who was granted lands in the same village on an earlier occasion by Tirumalai-Nāyakkar and Īśvara-nāyakkar, gave the land back, after retaining five hundred kuḻi of land in the same village for himself, for providing oblations during early morning service to the god of Dēvikkāpuram, and this piece of land was given to Nayiṉār piḷḷai. It is also mentioned that latter was to bring the cultivators, dig wells and tank and reclaim the land and was to get the land cultivated with the crops of his choice. He was not to remit taxes kaḍamai, kāṇikkai, poṉvari, māvaḍai, maravaḍai, vāḻai, karumbu, iñji, and also vāśaṟkaḍamai, pēṟkaḍamai, taṟikkaḍamai, sekkōṭṭu-kkāṇikkai, kaṭṭāyam, mādārikkam, talaiyārikkam, āsuvakkaḍamai, paṭṭaḍai, nūlāyam, paḻavari, puduvari, naṟpaśu, nallerumai, naṟkiḍā, and several other taxes, but instead the kāṇi holder was to remit certain amount of paddy and money thrice in a year to the temple treaury. It is also stated further that he was to enjoy this right of cultivation (uḻavaḍai-kāṇiyāṭchchi) hereditarily.
Viśvēśvarasivāchārya, Samarapuṅgava-dīkshitar, Tirumalainambi, and others, including the accountant of the temple at Dēvakkapuram, Īśurabrahmarāyaṉ Eṭṭi Appaṉ, figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara metiṉimicura kaṇṭa(ya) kaṭṭāri cāḷuva (cāḷuva) naraciṅkarāyatevamahārāyar kumārar Immaṭirāya teva mahārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 4 100 2 10 9ṉ melcellā niṉṟa Irattākṣi samvatsarattu miṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu cukkiṟavāramum tecamiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭu
Irācakempiraṉ malaikku Aṭaitta murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastānam tevikkāpuram nayiṉār tirumalaruṭaiyār śrīpaṇṭārattukku kaṭavarāṉa kurukkaḷ bhikṣāmaṭam viśveśvaraśivācāriya Ayyaṉum tāṉattārum Āka Ivvaṉaivarum meṟpaṭi Ūrār maṉṟāṭiyaḷil kaḷappāḷar cūriya tevar makaṉār nāyiṉāmpiḷḷaikku Uḻavukāṇiyāṭci cilācātanam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi Akaramāḷappiṟantāṉ samarapūṅkava
dikṣitar Akkiṉi kottiṟattukku sadhiraṇya Utaka dārākaṟuvamākaruḷum titta tirumalaināyakkarum Īśvaranāyakkarumāṉa Utakam paṇṇik kuṭutta paṭaiviṭṭil cimaipuram Opaḷi kaṉṉaṭiyamāraṇaiyil maṇaṟpākkamāṉa comācipuram kollaippaṟṟu grāmam Oṉṟil samarapūṅkavadīkṣitar Akkiṉi kottaṟattukku kollaippaṟṟu nilattile Añnūṟu kuḻi vaiccukkoṇṭu niṉṟa nāṟpāṟkellaiyum nayiṉār tirumalar Uṭaiya
nayiṉāṟku Udayakāla dadyotaṉa naivedyattukku tikṣitar tāraivāttukkuk kuṭukkaiyil Inta maṇaṟpākkam nāṟpāṟkellaiyum nāṅkaḷ Ivaṟku Uḻavukāṇiyākak kuṭukkaiyil Ivar nāḷatu mutalāka Uḻavukāṇiyākak kaikkoṇṭu vanteṟukiṟa kuṭiyaṉaiyum Ēṟṟic cantaiyum Eṟṟi navamāka Eri tāṅkal kiṇaṟum veṭṭi kaḻaṉiyum tirutti nañceypuñcey nāṟpāṟkellaiyum tām veṇṭum pa
yir (payiṟ)ceytu koḷḷakkaṭavarākavum payirceyyum Iṭattu kaṭamaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa palatāṉṉiyavaṟkamum kāṇikkai poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa pala poṉvaṟkamum māvaṭai maravaṭai vāḻai karumpu mañcaḷiñci Uḷḷiṭṭa toṭṭappaṟṟukkaṭamaiyum kamuku teṉṉamaram veṟṟilaikkaṭamaiyum nañcey nilap puñceyk kaṭamaiyum puñceyk kaṭamai maṟṟum nañceyil Eppeṟpaṭṭa kaṭamaiyum
vācaṟkaṭamai peṟkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamai cekkoṭṭuk kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam mātārikkam talaiyārikkam Ācuvakkaṭamai paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam Iṭaittuṟai veṭṭivari koyilvācaliṟ piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari nallerutu naṟpacu nallerumai naṟkiṭāk koṇikai virimuṭṭu Eṭa kaṭṭāyam koṭi kaṭṭāyam Eṭuttaḷaḻu viruttuppaṭi Uṭukaṟai mukampārvai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakala Upātiyum Uḷpaṭa Iva
varuṣam nāḷatu mutal varuṣam Oṉṟukku tirumalaruṭaiyār śrī paṇṭārattukku celuttum ø3 10 cūlakkālāl ḷa 7 1000 5 100 Āka rattākṣi varuṣam paṅkuṉi māta mutal cukkila varuṣam Āni māta varaikku varuṣam 5 kantāyam 1kkum celuttum ø100 6 10ḷa 4 10000 piṟamātūta varuṣa mutalāka varuṣam 1 kku celuttum ø100 cūlakkālāl ḷā0000 Inta rekaip piṟakāram cantiṟātityavaraiyum varuṣa varuṣantoṟum muṉṟu
kantāyamākap paṇamum celutti nellum Aḷakkakkaṭavarākavum Inta Uḻavaṭai kāṇiyāṭci cantiṟātittavaraiyum Ivar cantāṉa paramparai Uḷḷataṉaiyum naṭattak kaṭavatu Ākavum tiṅkaḷ tivacam tiruṉāḷ koyil Ūṭiyum Āḷamañci Uṇṭāṉatu koyiṟ cirmaikkuaṟṟa matikāri naṭattakkaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Uḻavu kāṇiyāṭci cilācātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttamaikku Ivai viśveśvaraśivācārya lipi Ivai samarapūṅkava
dīkṣitan lipī
Ivai tirumalainampi Eḻuttu Ivai cantiranampi Eḻuttu Ivai Ettappanampi Eḻuttu Ivai karaiyeṟaviṭṭār Eḻuttu Ivai Āḻvār puḻukuraipperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ naraciṅka kāliṅkarāyareṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Īśvara kaḷappāḷanayiṉāmpiḷḷai Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vāṇṭār cuttira nayiṉār sākṣi lakṣmaṇa tikṣitar Ippaṭikku Ivvitañ colla Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai tevakkāpuramkoyilkaṇakku yicurapiramarāyaṉ Eṭṭiappaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.354 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
